goals.title: 用户要求：用并行 agents 完成本 daily-arxiv 项目：每天获取 arXiv 最新论文，并接入 LLM 做阅读总结摘要。当前...
goals.objective: 用户要求：用并行 agents 完成本 daily-arxiv 项目：每天获取 arXiv 最新论文，并接入 LLM 做阅读总结摘要。当前仓库 main 最新提交清空了工作树，但上一提交 965a177 包含完整 Next/TypeScript 实现，可作为恢复和收敛基线。交付物必须可运行、可测试，并通过 CLI/服务真实表面证明每日抓取和 LLM 摘要流程可用。

successCriteria.scenario: CLI happy path: pnpm daily:summary -- --fixture tests/fixtures/arxiv-feed.xml --mock-llm --limit 1 --batch-date 2026-06-24 --output .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/daily-summary.md exits 0 and prints/writes Markdown for arXiv 2606.12345 with a Chinese mock LLM summary.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/daily-summary.md plus terminal transcript from the successful command
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/daily-summary.md (668 bytes) and .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/daily-summary-cli.log (912 bytes): daily:summary fixture + mock LLM exited 0 and generated Markdown for arXiv 2606.12345. cleanup: no server/tmux/container/browser spawned; CLI exited; agents 019efa13-3aa3, 019efa13-49c6, 019efa13-65a4, 019efa16, 019efa1a closed.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI edge path: pnpm daily:summary -- --fixture tests/fixtures/arxiv-feed.xml --limit 1 --batch-date 2026-06-24 exits non-zero without --mock-llm or LLM_BASE_URL/LLM_API_KEY/LLM_MODEL, and prints exact operator guidance.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Terminal transcript showing exit code 1 and message: Set LLM_BASE_URL, LLM_API_KEY, and LLM_MODEL, or pass --mock-llm.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/daily-summary-missing-llm.log (313 bytes): daily:summary fixture without --mock-llm exited 1 and printed required LLM env guidance. cleanup: no server/tmux/container/browser spawned; CLI exited; no temp runtime state.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression gate: DATABASE_URL=postgres://daily_arxiv:daily_arxiv@localhost:5433/daily_arxiv REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=build-only-secret-value-32-chars FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY=build-only-field-key pnpm quality exits 0, proving typecheck, all unit tests, and production build still pass.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Terminal transcript from pnpm quality showing 24 test files / 135 tests passed, Next build compiled successfully, and Quality gate passed.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/quality.log (6919 bytes): pnpm quality passed with tsc --noEmit, 24 test files / 135 tests passed, Next production build compiled successfully, Docker smoke skipped by script default. cleanup: no server/tmux/container/browser spawned; build process exited; no containers started.

goals.evidence: C001/C002/C003 pass with artifacts under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence; code review APPROVE, QA APPROVE, gate APPROVE; quality gate JSON at .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/quality-gate.json.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019efa10-4e24-71b1-b1f7-f5c307e38300/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019efa10-4e24-71b1-b1f7-f5c307e38300/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

aggregateCompletion.evidence: C001/C002/C003 pass with artifacts under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence; code review APPROVE, QA APPROVE, gate APPROVE; quality gate JSON at .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/quality-gate.json.

goal.objective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019efa10-4e24-71b1-b1f7-f5c307e38300/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019efa10-4e24-71b1-b1f7-f5c307e38300/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
